sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 122 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 20.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Faheem Bhayo, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the respondent. It is jointly stated that in view of orders dated 02.12.2025 and 13.01.2026 it would be in the interest of justice and of all parties concerned to set aside the impugned order and remand the matter to the Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
